mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username as sender_name, u.avatar as sender_avatar FROM chat_message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
SELECT m.*, u.username as sender_name, u.avatar as sender_avatar FROM chat_message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY m.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message(session_id, sender_id, content, type, file_url, file_name, file_size, is_read) VALUES(#{sessionId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{type}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{isRead})
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND sender_id != #{userId} AND is_read = 0
